name: Mock Peanut Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread corn flakes over a large, oiled baking dish.
2. Mix corn syrup and sugar in a saucepan and bring to a boil.
3. Remove from heat. Add peanut butter and stir until melted.
4. Pour mixture over the cornflakes until well covered.
5. Spread thinly on wax paper.
6. Let cool completely.
Minnie Lee, LPN
